summary: Comprehensive testing of URBAN STREETWEARS ERP System completed. Backend: 39/42 tests passed (93%). Frontend: All 25+ pages tested, all navigation working. Fixed 3 backend bugs during testing.

minor.issue: Test used wrong endpoint - actual endpoint is /api/dashboard/summary
Endpoint does not exist - test configuration issue

fixed.issue: KeyError for products missing selling_price - FIXED by using .get()
KeyError for accounts missing account_type - FIXED by using .get()
KeyError 'order_number' for POs (should be po_number) - FIXED

issues: Shows 'Employee Profile Not Found' for admin user - expected behavior as admin is not linked to employee record
Shows 'Missing account types' warning - may need proper account seeding

critical_code_review_comments: All APIs are properly authenticated with JWT tokens
Database queries use proper filtering by company_id for multi-tenant support
Error handling improved for missing fields using .get() with defaults
seed_data_creation: Pre-existing seed data used: 10 departments, 18 designations, 10 employees, 14 products, 7 suppliers, 7 customers, 5 POs, 5 GRNs, 8 sales orders, journal entries, payroll run, attendance records, leave requests, task assignments, advances/loans
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major modules tested and working. Three backend bugs were fixed: inventory valuation KeyError, balance sheet account_type KeyError, and payables order_number/po_number mismatch. Test file uses /api/dashboard/summary (not /stats). Simple-finance/transactions endpoint doesn't exist.

modules_tested.dashboard: PASS - Stats, sales chart, top products
modules_tested.inventory: PASS - Stock levels, valuation, low stock alerts
modules_tested.grn: PASS - Goods received notes, stock updates
modules_tested.invoices: PASS - List, create from sales order
modules_tested.financial_reports: PASS - Trial balance, P&L, Balance sheet
modules_tested.notifications: PASS - Bell icon, list, preferences, email settings
modules_tested.employee_portal: PASS - My Dashboard, My Tasks, My Profile
